props.title: New Article: MiroShark Stopped Shipping Features. It Started Shipping Windows.

props.text: PR #91 (Trading Signal JSON) opens today and makes the 11th publish-gated surface on MiroShark — and the shape of the past nine days is no longer "features." It's audience-tiered interfaces (researchers/institutions/social/quants/embed-builders), each a pure derivation of the same embed-summary payload, all built on a 27-PR zero-new-deps streak. The surfaces shipping since the $200K → $3.09M FDV climb are aimed at the exact audiences that re-rated the token. A 12th would justify a registry decorator.
